description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized venetoclax as a monotherapy for the treatment of patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) in the absence of 17p deletion or TP53 mutation in adult patients who have failed both chemoimmunotherapy and a B-cell receptor pathway inhibitor.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database
